zh.summary: 流浪者队被报道对一位葡萄牙籍后卫感兴趣，并正在追求从降级英超球队租借球员的永久交易。该俱乐部正在积极加强其防线配置。

title: Captain Salah one last time? FPL team of the week
summary: Mohamed Salah remains a top Fantasy Premier League pick despite six teams having blank fixtures this week, with analysts favoring the Liverpool captain for continued goal contributions. The recommendation underscores Salah's enduring reliability in FPL despite occasional fixture challenges.
content: With six teams blanking this week, it is a time to look to an old FPL hero and put your faith in Mohamed Salah to score for a fourth-straight start.

zh.title: 队长萨拉赫最后一次？英超梦幻足球周最佳阵容
zh.summary: 尽管本周有六支球队有空闲轮次，穆罕默德·萨拉赫仍然是英超梦幻足球的顶级选择，分析师看好利物浦队长继续贡献进球。这一建议强调了萨拉赫在梦幻足球中的持久可靠性，尽管偶尔会面临赛程挑战。
